title: Digital Analytics Manager – App (m/f/d)
required_skills: Mobile analytics experience — AppsFlyer or Adjust
App analytics expertise (tracking setup, KPIs, funnels)
matched_skills: Funnel analysis and user journey insights (Hapag-Lloyd, Moli Media)
Data quality and tracking QA (Hapag-Lloyd data artefacts)
Performance dashboard building (Power BI, Looker Studio)
missing_skills: Mobile analytics tools (AppsFlyer, Adjust) — not mentioned in CV
core_responsibilities: Own and develop app analytics setup from scratch
Design and manage tracking concepts, KPIs, and dashboards
Analyse user journeys and funnels, generate actionable insights
Ensure data quality, compliance, and documentation
Collaborate with product, marketing, and tech teams on tracking rollout
recommended_emphasis: Lead with funnel analysis, KPI design, and data quality work from Hapag-Lloyd
Highlight Power BI dashboarding and performance measurement experience
Frame HSBC reporting infrastructure as analytics setup and maintenance analogue
Be transparent about AppsFlyer/Adjust gap — position as quick learner
Cross-functional collaboration is a strong match — emphasise it

company_info.size_raw: Europe's No.1 e-pharmacy, implied large company
